syntax_3461.creator: Morkaz
syntax_3461.title: Fishing Hook
syntax_3461.description: Return fishing hook as Entity in fishing event.

en: Return fishing hook as Entity in fishing event.

syntax_3462.creator: Morkaz
syntax_3462.title: Fishing State
syntax_3462.description: Return fishing state as string in fishing event.

en: Return fishing state as string in fishing event.

syntax_3445.creator: Morkaz
syntax_3445.title: On Block Piston Push
syntax_3445.description: Called when block is pulled by piston. Cancelling this event will prevent piston from pulling.

en: Called when block is pulled by piston. Cancelling this event will prevent piston from pulling.
Called when block stops falling.

syntax_3448.creator: Morkaz
syntax_3448.title: Entity Having Potion Effect
syntax_3448.description:
Checks if living entity has applied given potion effect(s). 
If one of this effects will exist on entity, return will be "true".
syntax_3448.syntax_pattern:
[morkazsk] [the] %livingentity% (has|is having) potion effect %potioneffecttypes%
[morkazsk] [the] %livingentity% (hasn(t|'t)|is((nt|n't)| not) having) potion effect %potioneffecttypes%

en:
Checks if living entity has applied given potion effect(s). 
If one of this effects will exist on entity, return will be "true".

syntax_3450.creator: Morkaz
syntax_3450.title: Play Sound at Location
syntax_3450.description:
It will play sound at specific location with given pitch and volume for everyone.
Use bukkit "Sound" enum names as sound name.
List of names is here: https://hub.spigotmc.org/javadocs/bukkit/org/bukkit/Sound.html
Bukkit names may be in any case heigh and may be separated with "." instead of "_".
If sound name will be not recognized, error will NOT be thrown like in Skript's play sound, so your scripts will not crash and will be safe.
There will be notification in console in this case with given sound name that is invalid.

en:
It will play sound at specific location with given pitch and volume for everyone.
Use bukkit "Sound" enum names as sound name.
List of names is here: https://hub.spigotmc.org/javadocs/bukkit/org/bukkit/Sound.html
Bukkit names may be in any case heigh and may be separated with "." instead of "_".
If sound name will be not recognized, error will NOT be thrown like in Skript's play sound, so your scripts will not crash and will be safe.
There will be notification in console in this case with given sound name that is invalid.

syntax_3451.creator: Morkaz
syntax_3451.title: Play Sound for Player
syntax_3451.description: Plays sound only to single player.
syntax_3451.syntax_pattern:
play [raw] sound %string% at %location% [with] pitch %number% [and] volume %number% (to|for) %player%
play %string% specifically (to|for) %player% [with] pitch %number% [and] volume %number%

en: Plays sound only to single player.

syntax_3452.creator: Morkaz
syntax_3452.title: Push Player or Entity from Location
syntax_3452.description: It will push living entity from location direction with specific force (if definded).
syntax_3452.syntax_pattern:
push [the] %livingentity% from %location%
push [the] %livingentity% from %location% with force %number%

en: It will push living entity from location direction with specific force (if definded).

syntax_3453.creator: Morkaz
syntax_3453.title: Show Block Break Stage to Player
syntax_3453.description: This effect will show block break stage of block in given location.

en: This effect will show block break stage of block in given location.

syntax_3455.creator: Morkaz
syntax_3455.title: Spawn Particle for Player
syntax_3455.description: Spawn particle for single player at location.
syntax_3455.syntax_pattern: [morkazsk](spawn|show) %number% [of] particle[s] %string% (to|for) %player% at %location% offset [by] %number%(, | and )%number%(, | and )%number% with speed %number%

en: Spawn particle for single player at location.

syntax_3456.creator: Morkaz
syntax_3456.title: Cursor Item of Player
syntax_3456.description: Returns item in cursor while any gui is oppened.

en: Returns item in cursor while any gui is oppened.

syntax_3457.creator: Morkaz
syntax_3457.title: Date from Unix Time
syntax_3457.description: Return skript's date object from unix time number.

en: Return skript's date object from unix time number.

syntax_3458.creator: Morkaz
syntax_3458.title: Drops Of Block
syntax_3458.description: Returns generated drop list of block. You can specify tool using second syntax.

en: Returns generated drop list of block. You can specify tool using second syntax.
Called when block starts falling.

syntax_3449.creator: Morkaz
syntax_3449.title: Naturally Break Block
syntax_3449.description:
This effect will naturally break given block.
It is possible to define specific tool which block will be broken (in this situation drop can be modified by this tool).

en:
This effect will naturally break given block.
It is possible to define specific tool which block will be broken (in this situation drop can be modified by this tool).

syntax_3459.creator: Morkaz
syntax_3459.title: Duration of Potion Effect
syntax_3459.description: Returns duration of applied potion effect of entity.

en: Returns duration of applied potion effect of entity.

syntax_3466.creator: Morkaz
syntax_3466.title: Piston Block
syntax_3466.description: Returns piston block in piston events.

en: Returns piston block in piston events.

syntax_3482.creator: Morkaz
syntax_3482.title: Value of Mox Pair
syntax_3482.description:
Returns Value of Mox Pair.
Full tutorial: https://github.com/MorkaZ/MorkazSk/wiki/Mox-Data-tutorial

en:
Returns Value of Mox Pair.
Full tutorial: https://github.com/MorkaZ/MorkazSk/wiki/Mox-Data-tutorial

syntax_3443.creator: Morkaz
syntax_3443.title: On Block Fall
syntax_3443.description: Called when block starts or stops falling.

en: Called when block starts or stops falling.

syntax_3444.creator: Morkaz
syntax_3444.title: On Block Piston Pull
syntax_3444.description: Called when block is pulled by piston. Cancelling this event will prevent piston from pulling.

en: Called when block is pulled by piston. Cancelling this event will prevent piston from pulling.

syntax_3470.creator: Morkaz
syntax_3470.title: On Chunk Enter/Leave
syntax_3470.description:
Called when player moves between chunks (16x16 world areas).
Very good for protecting areas scripts like factions.

en:
Called when player moves between chunks (16x16 world areas).
Very good for protecting areas scripts like factions.

syntax_3474.creator: Morkaz
syntax_3474.title: Mox Data contains Mox Key
syntax_3474.description:
Checks if Mox Data contains Mox Pair with given key.
Full tutorial: https://github.com/MorkaZ/MorkazSk/wiki/Mox-Data-tutorial
syntax_3474.syntax_pattern:
%moxdata% contain[s] [mox] pair with key[s] %strings%
%moxdata% do(esn't|es not| not) contain[s] [mox] pair with key[s] %strings%

en:
Checks if Mox Data contains Mox Pair with given key.
Full tutorial: https://github.com/MorkaZ/MorkazSk/wiki/Mox-Data-tutorial

syntax_3475.creator: Morkaz
syntax_3475.title: Add Mox Pair to Mox Data
syntax_3475.description:
This effect will add mox pair to chain of mox data.
Full tutorial: https://github.com/MorkaZ/MorkazSk/wiki/Mox-Data-tutorial

en:
This effect will add mox pair to chain of mox data.
Full tutorial: https://github.com/MorkaZ/MorkazSk/wiki/Mox-Data-tutorial

syntax_3476.creator: Morkaz
syntax_3476.title: Remove Mox Pair from Mox Data
syntax_3476.description:
This effect will remove mox pair from chain of mox data
Full tutorial: https://github.com/MorkaZ/MorkazSk/wiki/Mox-Data-tutorial

en:
This effect will remove mox pair from chain of mox data
Full tutorial: https://github.com/MorkaZ/MorkazSk/wiki/Mox-Data-tutorial

syntax_3472.creator: Morkaz
syntax_3472.title: Block Break Dropping Items
syntax_3472.description:
Returns boolean if block in "on break" event is dropping items.
To set dropping in this event just set this expression to true or false.

en:
Returns boolean if block in "on break" event is dropping items.
To set dropping in this event just set this expression to true or false.

syntax_3460.creator: Morkaz
syntax_3460.title: Fishing Caught Entity
syntax_3460.description: Caught entity (hooked by fishing rod) in fishing event. It may be also fish drop item in specific fishing state.

en: Caught entity (hooked by fishing rod) in fishing event. It may be also fish drop item in specific fishing state.

syntax_3463.creator: Morkaz
syntax_3463.title: Item of Dropped Item
syntax_3463.description: Returns item from dropped item entity.

en: Returns item from dropped item entity.

syntax_3478.creator: Morkaz
syntax_3478.title: Keys of Mox Data
syntax_3478.description:
Returns all Keys of Mox Data object.
Full tutorial: https://github.com/MorkaZ/MorkazSk/wiki/Mox-Data-tutorial

en:
Returns all Keys of Mox Data object.
Full tutorial: https://github.com/MorkaZ/MorkazSk/wiki/Mox-Data-tutorial

syntax_3479.creator: Morkaz
syntax_3479.title: Mox Data
syntax_3479.description:
Creates new instance of Mox Data.
You can create it empty or from text object.
Full tutorial: https://github.com/MorkaZ/MorkazSk/wiki/Mox-Data-tutorial
syntax_3479.syntax_pattern:
(new|empty) mox data
(new|empty) mox data with main key %string%
[new] mox data (of|from) %string%
[new] mox data (of|from) %string% with main key %string%

en:
Creates new instance of Mox Data.
You can create it empty or from text object.
Full tutorial: https://github.com/MorkaZ/MorkazSk/wiki/Mox-Data-tutorial

syntax_3480.creator: Morkaz
syntax_3480.title: Mox Pair
syntax_3480.description:
Returns special Mox Pair of key and value.
Useable in Mox Data operations.
Full tutorial: https://github.com/MorkaZ/MorkazSk/wiki/Mox-Data-tutorial

en:
Returns special Mox Pair of key and value.
Useable in Mox Data operations.
Full tutorial: https://github.com/MorkaZ/MorkazSk/wiki/Mox-Data-tutorial

syntax_3473.creator: Morkaz
syntax_3473.title: Previous Chunk of Chunk Enter Event
syntax_3473.description: Returns previous chunk in event "on chunk enter".

en: Returns previous chunk in event "on chunk enter".

syntax_3477.creator: Morkaz
syntax_3477.title: Key Name of Mox Pair
syntax_3477.description:
Returns Key Name of Mox Pair.
Full tutorial: https://github.com/MorkaZ/MorkazSk/wiki/Mox-Data-tutorial

en:
Returns Key Name of Mox Pair.
Full tutorial: https://github.com/MorkaZ/MorkazSk/wiki/Mox-Data-tutorial

syntax_3468.creator: Morkaz
syntax_3468.title: Tier/Level of Potion Effect of Entity
syntax_3468.description: Returns tier level of given potion effect type applied to entity.

en: Returns tier level of given potion effect type applied to entity.

syntax_3464.creator: Morkaz
syntax_3464.title: Last Login Date of Offline Player
syntax_3464.description:
Returns date of last login of offline player. 
If offline player never logged, it will be <none>.

en:
Returns date of last login of offline player. 
If offline player never logged, it will be <none>.

syntax_3465.creator: Morkaz
syntax_3465.title: Last Login Date of Player
syntax_3465.description:
Returns date of last login of player.
If player never logged, it will be <none>.

en:
Returns date of last login of player.
If player never logged, it will be <none>.

syntax_3481.creator: Morkaz
syntax_3481.title: Mox Pairs of Mox Data
syntax_3481.description:
Returns all Mox Pairs of Mox Data object.
Full tutorial: https://github.com/MorkaZ/MorkazSk/wiki/Mox-Data-tutorial

en:
Returns all Mox Pairs of Mox Data object.
Full tutorial: https://github.com/MorkaZ/MorkazSk/wiki/Mox-Data-tutorial

syntax_3467.creator: Morkaz
syntax_3467.title: Sorted List By Values With Custom Format
syntax_3467.description:
Returns sorted list with custom format of values.
Use @value and @index to manipulate content of variable list.
syntax_3467.syntax_pattern:
sorted %numbers% from highest to lowest with (output|format) %string%
sorted %numbers% from lowest to highest with (output|format) %string%

en:
Returns sorted list with custom format of values.
Use @value and @index to manipulate content of variable list.

syntax_3469.creator: Morkaz
syntax_3469.title: Unix Time from Date
syntax_3469.description: Returns unix time (long number) of skript's date object.

en: Returns unix time (long number) of skript's date object.

syntax_3483.creator: Morkaz
syntax_3483.title: Values of Mox Data
syntax_3483.description:
Returns all Values of Mox Data object.
Full tutorial: https://github.com/MorkaZ/MorkazSk/wiki/Mox-Data-tutorial

en:
Returns all Values of Mox Data object.
Full tutorial: https://github.com/MorkaZ/MorkazSk/wiki/Mox-Data-tutorial

syntax_3484.creator: Morkaz
syntax_3484.title: Mox Data Type
syntax_3484.description:
Mox Data type. It can hold multiple values indexed by keys in one field called Mox Chain.
Specially created for databases to not create a lot of columns but it can be also used in normal skript features - for example in NBT Tags.

en:
Mox Data type. It can hold multiple values indexed by keys in one field called Mox Chain.
Specially created for databases to not create a lot of columns but it can be also used in normal skript features - for example in NBT Tags.

syntax_3471.creator: Morkaz
syntax_3471.title: Actual Chunk of Chunk Enter Event
syntax_3471.description: Returns actual chunk of player's location in event "on chunk enter".

en: Returns actual chunk of player's location in event "on chunk enter".

syntax_3485.creator: Morkaz
syntax_3485.title: Mox Pair Type
syntax_3485.description:
Mox Pair type. It holds key and value. Useable in Mox Data operations
Specially created for databases to not create a lot of columns but can be also used in common scripting.

en:
Mox Pair type. It holds key and value. Useable in Mox Data operations
Specially created for databases to not create a lot of columns but can be also used in common scripting.

syntax_3507.creator: Morkaz
syntax_3507.title: Get Mox Pair of Mox Data by Key
syntax_3507.description:
Returns Mox Pair from Mox Data by given key. If pair will not be found, it will be <none>.
Full tutorial: https://github.com/MorkaZ/MorkazSk/wiki/Mox-Data-tutorial
syntax_3507.syntax_pattern:
[mox] pair of %moxdata% (by [key]|that contain[s] [key]|with key|key[[ed] by]) %string%
[mox] pair (with key|key[[ed] by]|that contain[s] key) %string% (of|from) %moxdata%

en:
Returns Mox Pair from Mox Data by given key. If pair will not be found, it will be <none>.
Full tutorial: https://github.com/MorkaZ/MorkazSk/wiki/Mox-Data-tutorial

syntax_3508.creator: Morkaz
syntax_3508.title: Main Key of Mox Data
syntax_3508.description:
Returns main key of Mox Data. Usually it is index name, for example: player name, uuid.
Full tutorial: https://github.com/MorkaZ/MorkazSk/wiki/Mox-Data-tutorial

en:
Returns main key of Mox Data. Usually it is index name, for example: player name, uuid.
Full tutorial: https://github.com/MorkaZ/MorkazSk/wiki/Mox-Data-tutorial

syntax_3563.creator: Morkaz
syntax_3563.title: Make Entity Glowing with Color
syntax_3563.description:
This effect will make entity glow with specific color. To unglow use NONE as color.
All color names: BLACK(0, "0"), DARK_BLUE(1, "1"), DARK_GREEN(2, "2"), DARK_AQUA(3, "3"), DARK_RED(4, "4"), DARK_PURPLE(5, "5"), GOLD(6, "6"), GRAY(7, "7"), DARK_GRAY(8, "8"), BLUE(9, "9"), GREEN(10, "a"), AQUA(11, "b"), RED(12, "c"), PURPLE(13, "d"), YELLOW(14, "e"), WHITE(15, "f"), NONE(-1, "");

en:
This effect will make entity glow with specific color. To unglow use NONE as color.
All color names: BLACK(0, "0"), DARK_BLUE(1, "1"), DARK_GREEN(2, "2"), DARK_AQUA(3, "3"), DARK_RED(4, "4"), DARK_PURPLE(5, "5"), GOLD(6, "6"), GRAY(7, "7"), DARK_GRAY(8, "8"), BLUE(9, "9"), GREEN(10, "a"), AQUA(11, "b"), RED(12, "c"), PURPLE(13, "d"), YELLOW(14, "e"), WHITE(15, "f"), NONE(-1, "");

syntax_3454.creator: Morkaz
syntax_3454.title: Spawn Particle at Location
syntax_3454.description:
This effect will spawn specified particle with given options. It will be spawned for everyone
If chunk will be not loaded, it will not spawn particle, so it is safe and it will not affect your TPS that much like normal spawning may do.
Use bukkit "Particle" enum names as particle name. You can use dots and name do not have to be upper cased.
List of names is here: https://hub.spigotmc.org/javadocs/spigot/org/bukkit/Particle.html
syntax_3454.syntax_pattern:
[morkazsk] (summon|play|create|activate|spawn) %number% [of] [particle] %string%:%number% offset (at|by|from) %number%, %number%(,| and) %number% at %location%
[morkazsk] (summon|play|create|activate|spawn) %number% [of] [particle] %string% offset (at|by|from) %number%, %number%(,| and) %number% with extra [data] %number% at %location%

en:
This effect will spawn specified particle with given options. It will be spawned for everyone
If chunk will be not loaded, it will not spawn particle, so it is safe and it will not affect your TPS that much like normal spawning may do.
Use bukkit "Particle" enum names as particle name. You can use dots and name do not have to be upper cased.
List of names is here: https://hub.spigotmc.org/javadocs/spigot/org/bukkit/Particle.html
